title: No Credit
content:
No Credit
Body paragraphs are not fully developed, and the topic sentences need to be reworked.
20 pts
This criterion is linked to a Learning OutcomeRough Draft: Body Paragraphs, Dialogue
10 pts
Full Credit
Integrated dialogue effectively within the narrative, using conversations between characters or individuals to provide context, advance the plot, reveal character insights, and enhance the overall storytelling.
5 pts
Partial Credit
Integrated dialogue is limited, but effective in the narrative. Conversations between characters or individuals weakly provide context, and insight, but do not effectively advance the plot. Some work is needed to enhance the overall storytelling.
0 pts
No Credit
Little evidence of dialogue that provides context, or insight, to advance the plot. The overall storytelling is absent.
10 pts
This criterion is linked to a Learning OutcomeRough Draft: Body Paragraphs, Descriptions
20 pts
Full Credit
Used descriptive devices like vivid language, sensory details, and imagery.
context: From document: Weeks 1 - 6 Canvas Data Dump — chunk 61 (chunk 61/188)
